Adams Point WMA, 85 Adams Point Rd, Durham, NH 03824, USA

Saw growing raspberry or black raspberry in late summer. adams point is a free park with hiking trails, need to walk like 5 minutes along the trails in clearing to find the berries. park along road, not in the UNH lot. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: Jun

Walk under train tracks toward college woods, look to your left - two apple trees along tracks. Fruit can be fairly high, but are worth a little effort! Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
